description: Image display component. Supports URL, uploaded files, data URLs, icon library (SVG mask), and database binding. Can show different images for portrait/landscape in game mode.

src.description: Image source URL, data URL, or asset path

keepAspect.description: Maintain aspect ratio when resizing (both dimensions must be fixed)

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio (width/height). Auto-set when image is uploaded.

iconSrc.description: SVG content from icon library (overrides src when set)

iconColor.description: Color applied to the SVG icon mask

dataField.description: DB column (BLOB type) to load image from

srcPortrait.description: GAME MODE: Override src when device is in portrait orientation

srcLandscape.description: GAME MODE: Override src when device is in landscape orientation

notes: PictureBox is an alias — use 'Image' as the type name.
For icons from the built-in library, set iconSrc to the SVG string and iconColor for the color.
To bind to a database image: set dataSourceType='database' and dataField to a BLOB column.
srcPortrait and srcLandscape only take effect in game-mode screens.
